title: Transcription factor PagMYB31 positively regulates cambium activity and negatively regulates xylem development in poplar

paper_analysis.summary: This study uses genetic and molecular biology experiments in poplar to show that the transcription factor PagMYB31 coordinates cambium activity and xylem development by regulating cell proliferation, expansion, and secondary cell wall formation.
